title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-24
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Garden Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, updating health checks and metrics across the community greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of application metrics and health checks in the APPS and GREENHOUSE documentation.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest health statuses and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot checking on plants in a greenhouse with a clipboard, representing the automated health checks and metrics gathering. Polly the bee assists as a gardener.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby wearing a tiny gardener's hat. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites.
